name: Midnight Mint Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups Thin Mint cookies, finely crushed
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------FILLING----------------------------------
1 cup Butter
2 cups Sifted powdered sugar
4 ounces Unsweetened chocolate, melted
4 Eggs
1 teaspoon Peppermint extract
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). Blend cookie crumbs with butter and press into bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie pan. Bake for 5 to 7 minutes and cool thoroughly. Beat butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Add chocolate, eggs, and peppermint extract, beating until well combined. Mound filling into the baked pie shell. Freeze until firm.
